mapper.select: SELECT o.`id` , o.`code` , d.`delivered_at` , o.`total_amount` , o.`status` FROM `orders` o JOIN `delivery` d ON o.`delivery_id` = d.`id` WHERE o.`franchise_id` = #{franchiseId} AND o.`user_id` = #{userId} AND o.`status` = 'DELIVERED' AND d.delivered_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT po.`id` AS id , po.`product_id` , po.`order_id` , po.`quantity` , o.`code` AS orderCode , p.`code` AS productCode , p.`name` AS productName , p.`sale_price` , p.`unit` , p.`spec` , pg.`name` AS productGroupName , pt.`name` AS productTypeName , pa.`name` AS productAttributeName FROM `product_order` po JOIN `orders` o ON po.`order_id` = o.`id` JOIN `product` p ON po.`product_id` = p.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_group` pg ON p.`product_group_id` = pg.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_type` pt ON p.`product_type_id` = pt.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_attribute` pa ON p.`product_attribute_id` = pa.`id` WHERE o.`franchise_id` = #{franchiseId} AND o.`user_id` = #{userId} AND po.`order_id` = #{orderId}
